author: dev_alpha
message: Refactor comments in uart tx module
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
@@ -10,2 +10,2 @@
-// old comment
+// updated comment

author: dev_beta
message: Rename local counter alias for readability

author: dev_gamma
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
@@ -120,3 +120,3 @@
-// irq behavior
+// interrupt behavior and timing

author: dev_delta
dev_epsilon
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
@@ -40,2 +40,2 @@
-// divider step

author: dev_zeta
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
@@ -132,2 +132,2 @@
-// push when valid

author: dev_eta
dev_theta
message: Fix typo in module header comments
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart.sv
@@ -3,2 +3,2 @@
-// recevier
+// receiver

author: dev_iota
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
@@ -145,6 +145,5 @@
-    if (!tx_fifo_full && tx_valid_i) begin
+    if (tx_valid_i) begin
       tx_fifo_mem[tx_wptr] <= tx_data_i;
       tx_wptr <= tx_wptr + 1'b1;
     end

author: dev_kappa
dev_lambda
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
@@ -176,3 +176,3 @@
-    if (bit_cnt == 4'd7) begin
+    if (bit_cnt == 4'd6) begin
       rx_done <= 1'b1;
     end

author: dev_mu
message: Simplify reset logic in rx valid flag
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
@@ -64,4 +64,3 @@
-  if (!rst_ni) begin
-    rx_valid_o <= 1'b0;
-  end else begin
+  if (!rst_ni) begin
+  end else begin
     rx_valid_o <= rx_done;

author: dev_nu
dev_xi
dev_omicron
message: Fix tx fifo overflow guard bug
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_tx.sv
@@ -145,5 +145,6 @@
-    if (tx_valid_i) begin
+    if (!tx_fifo_full && tx_valid_i) begin
       tx_fifo_mem[tx_wptr] <= tx_data_i;
       tx_wptr <= tx_wptr + 1'b1;
     end

author: dev_pi
dev_rho
message: Fix off-by-one in rx bit counter
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
@@ -176,3 +176,3 @@
-    if (bit_cnt == 4'd6) begin
+    if (bit_cnt == 4'd7) begin
       rx_done <= 1'b1;
     end

author: dev_sigma
message: Fix reset behavior for rx valid
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_rx.sv
@@ -64,3 +64,4 @@
-  if (!rst_ni) begin
+  if (!rst_ni) begin
+    rx_valid_o <= 1'b0;
   end else begin
     rx_valid_o <= rx_done;

author: dev_tau
message: Remove unreachable branch for coverage cleanup
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
@@ -199,5 +199,2 @@
-    default: begin
-      state <= IDLE;
-    end
+    // unreachable default removed

author: dev_upsilon
message: Refactor fsm case tree and remove dead code
diff:
--- a/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
+++ b/rtl/nexus_uart_ctrl.sv
@@ -182,8 +182,5 @@
-    if (state == SEND && tx_done) begin
-      state <= IDLE;
-    end
+    if (state == SEND && tx_done) state <= IDLE;
